lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:
The Perfect Guru has made me perfect.
God is totally pervading and permeating everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਕਵਲ ਰਿਦ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur ke charan kaval rid dhaare |
lines.english: I enshrine the lotus feet of the Guru within my heart.
With joy and pleasure, I take my purifying bath.
I am a sacrifice to the Supreme Lord God. ||1||
All the sinners are purified.
Meeting with the Holy Saints, my evil-mindedness was eradicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਤਿਲ ਕਾ ਕੋਈ ਕਾਰਜ ਸਗਲ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bighan na laagai til kaa koee kaaraj sagal savaare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Not even the tiniest obstacle blocks my way; all my affairs are resolved. ||1||Pause||
Bathing in the sacred pool of Guru Ram Das,
So sing forever the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe;
all the sins one has committed are washed away. ||2||
joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, meditate on Him.
The fruits of your mind's desires are obtained
The Guru, the Lord of the World, is blissful;
by meditating on the Perfect Guru within your heart. ||3||
Servant Nanak meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
God has confirmed His innate nature. ||4||10||60||
chanting, meditating on the Lord of supreme bliss, He lives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਜ ਇਕੇਲੀ ਨੀਦ ਨਹੁ ਨੈਨਹ ਪਿਰੁ ਪਰਦੇਸਿ ਸਿਧਾਇਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sej ikelee need nahu nainah pir parades sidhaaeo |1|
lines.english: By bed is empty, and my eyes are sleepless; my Husband Lord has gone far away. ||1||
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਹ ਦਿਸ ਛਤ੍ਰ ਮੇਘ ਘਟਾ ਘਟ ਦਾਮਨਿ ਚਮਕਿ ਡਰਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: deh dis chhatr megh ghattaa ghatt daaman chamak ddaraaeo |
lines.english: In the ten directions, the clouds cover the sky like a canopy; through the dark clouds, lightning flashes, and I am terrified.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਕੋਸਰੋ ਸਿਧਿ ਕਰਤ ਲਾਲੁ ਤਬ ਚਤੁਰ ਪਾਤਰੋ ਆਇਓ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ek kosaro sidh karat laal tab chatur paataro aaeo | rahaau |
lines.english: When my Beloved used to go even a mile away, He would send me four letters. ||Pause||
Now, I receive no messages from Him, O mother!

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਬਿਸਰੈ ਇਹੁ ਲਾਲੁ ਪਿਆਰੋ ਸਰਬ ਗੁਣਾ ਸੁਖਦਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: kiau bisarai ihu laal piaaro sarab gunaa sukhadaaeo |
lines.english: How could I forget this Dear Beloved of mine? He is the Giver of peace, and all virtues.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਹਉ ਭੀਤਿ ਭਇਓ ਹੈ ਬੀਚੋ ਸੁਨਤ ਦੇਸਿ ਨਿਕਟਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: hau hau bheet bheo hai beecho sunat des nikattaaeo |
lines.english: The wall of egotism and pride separates us, but I can hear Him nearby.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਦਰਿ ਚਰਿ ਕੈ ਪੰਥੁ ਨਿਹਾਰਉ ਨੈਨ ਨੀਰਿ ਭਰਿ ਆਇਓ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mandar char kai panth nihaarau nain neer bhar aaeo |2|
lines.english: Ascending to His Mansion, I gaze upon His path, and my eyes are filled with tears. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਂਭੀਰੀ ਕੇ ਪਾਤ ਪਰਦੋ ਬਿਨੁ ਪੇਖੇ ਦੂਰਾਇਓ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bhaanbheeree ke paat parado bin pekhe dooraaeo |3|
lines.english: There is a veil between us, like the wings of a butterfly; without being able to see Him, He seems so far away. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਇਓ ਕਿਰਪਾਲੁ ਸਰਬ ਕੋ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਸਗਰੋ ਦੂਖੁ ਮਿਟਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: bheo kirapaal sarab ko tthaakur sagaro dookh mittaaeo |
lines.english: The Lord and Master of all has become merciful; He has dispelled all my sufferings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਉਮੈ ਭੀਤਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਖੋਈ ਤਉ ਦਇਆਰੁ ਬੀਠਲੋ ਪਾਇਓ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak haumai bheet gur khoee tau deaar beetthalo paaeo |4|
lines.english: Says Nanak, when the Guru tore down the wall of egotism, then, I found my Merciful Lord and Master. ||4||
All my fears have been dispelled, O mother!

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਗੁਨਾ ਨਿਧਿ ਰਾਇਓ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ॥੧੧॥੬੧॥
lines.translit: sarab gunaa nidh raaeo | rahaau doojaa |11|61|
lines.english: The Lord, our King, is the treasure of all virtue. ||Second Pause||11||61||
Whoever I seek, the Guru leads me to find.
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਈ ਬਹੋੜੁ ਬੰਦੀ ਛੋੜੁ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ਦੁਖਦਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: gee bahorr bandee chhorr nirankaar dukhadaaree |
lines.english: The Restorer of what was taken away, the Liberator from captivity; the Formless Lord, the Destroyer of pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਾ ਧਰਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਣਾ ਲੋਭੀ ਮਾਇਆਧਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: karam na jaanaa dharam na jaanaa lobhee maaeaadhaaree |
lines.english: I do not know about karma and good deeds; I do not know about Dharma and righteous living. I am so greedy, chasing after Maya.
O Dear Lord, You are the honor of the dishonored.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਪਰਿਓ ਭਗਤੁ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਕਾ ਇਹ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਪੈਜ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam pario bhagat govind kaa ih raakhahu paij tumaaree |1|
lines.english: I go by the name of God's devotee; please, save this honor of Yours. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸਾ ਬਾਲਕੁ ਭਾਇ ਸੁਭਾਈ ਲਖ ਅਪਰਾਧ ਕਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaisaa baalak bhaae subhaaee lakh aparaadh kamaavai |
lines.english: Like the child, innocently making thousands of mistakes

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਚੀਜਿਆ ਚੀਜ ਕਰੇ ਮੇਰਾ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ਤੇਰੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕਉ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੁ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: nicheejiaa cheej kare meraa govind teree kudarat kau kurabaan | rahaau |
lines.english: You make the unworthy ones worthy, O my Lord of the Universe; I am a sacrifice to Your almighty creative power. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਛਲੇ ਅਉਗੁਣ ਬਖਸਿ ਲਏ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਗੈ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: pichhale aaugun bakhas le prabh aagai maarag paavai |2|
lines.english: Please forgive my past actions, God, and place me on Your path for the future. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਝਿੜਕੇ ਬਹੁ ਭਾਤੀ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਪਿਤਾ ਗਲਿ ਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: kar upades jhirrake bahu bhaatee bahurr pitaa gal laavai |
lines.english: his father teaches him, and scolds him so many times, but still, he hugs him close in his embrace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਸਭ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਤਾ ਕਿਸੁ ਪਹਿ ਆਖਿ ਸੁਣਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: har antarajaamee sabh bidh jaanai taa kis peh aakh sunaaeeai |
lines.english: The Lord, the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts, knows all about my state of mind; so who else should I go to and speak to?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰ ਓਟ ਮੈ ਸਗਲੀ ਦੇਖੀ ਇਕ ਤੇਰੀ ਓਟ ਰਹਾਈਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: avar ott mai sagalee dekhee ik teree ott rahaaeeai |3|
lines.english: I have seen all other shelters, but Yours alone remains for me. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਣੈ ਕਥਨਿ ਨ ਭੀਜੈ ਗੋਬਿੰਦੁ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਵੈ ਪੈਜ ਰਖਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: kahanai kathan na bheejai gobind har bhaavai paij rakhaaeeai |
lines.english: The Lord, the Lord of the Universe, is not pleased by mere recitation of words; if it is pleasing to His Will, He preserves our honor.
